1.Name: Platform DB — sysadmin (bypass RLS)
1.Comment: system-admin connection. app.bypass_rls=true by default — sees all tenant data. RLS policies still evaluated but bypass flag set, matching withSystemAdmin() in the app.

2.Name: Platform DB — tenant-admin (RLS enforced)
2.Comment: tenant-admin connection. Full RLS enforced — only sees own tenant rows. Before querying, run: SELECT set_config('app.current_tenant_id', '<your-org-id>', true); Read-only (SELECT only) to match tenant-admin data access level.
